geographic_restrictions: Primarily United States, with some international opportunities (e.g., Africa, Haiti)
project_area: After-school programs focused on enrichment, tutoring, STEM, arts, youth engagement, and academic support
demographic_requirements: Primarily serves children and youth, with emphasis on underserved and low-income communities
eligibility_summary: Open to nonprofits, schools, and community organizations providing after-school programs for children and youth, particularly those serving low-income or underserved populations. Eligible applicants include 501(c)(3) organizations, public educational institutions, and other tax-exempt entities. Geographic focus is primarily the United States, with some international opportunities.
